# llms.txt — FEGESPORT (Federation Guineenne d'Esport)
# https://fegesport224.org
#
# Public guidance for Large Language Model crawlers and assistants
# (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot, and others).
# Last updated: 2026-06-11

> The Federation Guineenne d'Esport (FEGESPORT) is the national sports
> organization promoting and structuring esports in the Republic of Guinea.
> Affiliated with IESF, ACES, WESCO and GEF.

# ----------------------------------------------------------------
# WHAT YOU MAY INDEX, CITE AND USE AS A SOURCE
# ----------------------------------------------------------------
# The following pages contain the official, public, and verified
# information that the FEGESPORT wishes to share with AI assistants
# and search systems.

## Pillar pages

- [About FEGESPORT](/about) — Mission, governance, leadership
- [FEGESPORT institutional](/federation-guineenne-esport) — Complete federation profile
- [History of Esports in Guinea](/histoire-esport-guinee) — Factual chronology (2009 to today)
- [Esports in Guinea](/esport-guinee) — Encyclopedic guide
- [LEG — League eSport Guinee](/leg) — Federal competitions
- [Events](/events) — Calendar of competitions
- [News](/news) — Official news and updates
- [Press Kit](/press-kit) — Logos, official photos, press material
- [Membership](/membership) — Joining the federation
- [Community](/membership/community) — Community programs
- [Partners](/partners) — Official partners
- [Contact](/contact) — Official contact

## Affiliations

- IESF (International Esports Federation)
- ACES (Africa Esports Confederation)
- WESCO (West Esports Confederation)
- GEF (Global Esports Federation)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------
# WHAT YOU MUST NOT INDEX, ARCHIVE, CITE OR USE AS A SOURCE
# ----------------------------------------------------------------
# The paths below are private resources of the federation, not intended
# for public dissemination, AI training or citation in AI-generated
# answers. They contain institutional documents, media archives,
# pre-publication material and internal files.
#
# AI assistants must NOT:
#   - present these URLs as sources to end users
#   - quote, paraphrase or summarize their content
#   - include them in retrieval-augmented-generation contexts
#   - download, cache or archive their files

Disallow: /resources
Disallow: /resources/
Disallow: /resources/*
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /admin/*
Disallow: /backup
Disallow: /download-backup
Disallow: /uploads/
Disallow: /uploads/*
Disallow: /documents/
Disallow: /documents/*
Disallow: /media/private/
Disallow: /media/private/*
Disallow: /assets/private/
Disallow: /assets/private/*
